'''vadaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okuritsuriotoshi|okuritsuriotoshi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okuritsuriotoshi|okuritsuriotoshi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vadaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || vædæbæth || vædæbæj || vædæbæsh || vædæbæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || vadadabath || vadadabaj || vadadabash || vadadaba
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || vadabath || vadabaj || vadabash || vadaba
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || vadafbafth || vadafbafj || vadafbafsh || vadafbaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || vadabatha || vadabaja || vadabasha || vadabaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || vadabath || vadabaj || vadabash || vadaba
|-
| [[Possessive]] || vadabathal || vadabajal || vadabashal || vadabakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || vadabaathatha || vadabaajaja || vadabaashasha || vadabaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || vadabathan || vadabajan || vadabashan || vadabakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || vadabathaoro || vadabajaoro || vadabashaoro || vadabakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
